name: Wild Herbed Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add brown rice, wild rice, onion, and celery to the pan. Sauté for approximately 5 minutes or until the onion and celery are tender.
3. Add mushrooms, chicken broth, parsley, salt, thyme, and pepper. (Add pecans if desired.)
4. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour, or until all liquid has evaporated.
6. Serves 6-8.
Notes: We always use the pecans.
